# Pour Bébé

## About
Pour Bébé (pourbebes.ma) is a premium baby products e-commerce store serving the Moroccan market. We offer a curated selection of high-quality baby and maternity products with free shipping on orders over 400 DH, delivered across Morocco.

## Products & Categories
- Chambre & Sommeil: lits bébé, berceaux cododo, couffins, baby nests, matelas, literie, gigoteuses, veilleuses, meubles
- Sorties: poussettes, sièges auto, porte-bébé, sacs à langer
- Hygiène: bain bébé, soins & santé, change & couches
- Vêtements: bodies, pyjamas, grenouillères, ensembles, packs naissance
- Accessoires: coussins, jouets & éveil, bavoirs
- Idées Cadeaux: coffrets naissance, liste de naissance
- Pour Maman: allaitement, grossesse & confort

## Key Features
- Liste de naissance (baby registry): Create and share a personalized birth list with family and friends
- Free shipping on orders over 400 DH
- Delivery across all of Morocco in 3–5 business days
- Physical showroom in Casablanca (Maarif district)
- Cash on delivery, bank transfer, and card payment options

## Contact & Location
- Website: https://pourbebes.ma
- Phone: +212 (0)696-71-61-87
- Address: Rue Abou Abdellah Nafi, 1er étage Benomar Center, Maarif, Casablanca, Maroc
- Email: commandes@pourbebes.ma

## Brands Carried
Bébé 9, Combelle, Bébé Confort, Maxi-Cosi, Théophile & Patachou, Babycalin, Meyco, Nattou, CAM, Tiny Love, Badabulle, Mommy Bag, Candide, Kikkaboo, Cayzen, Interbaby, Aybus Baby, Midirik, Minisoft, Eke Baby, Naf Naf, Pakel, Mini Zeyn, Nikuby

## Target Audience
Moroccan parents, expectant mothers, gift-givers looking for baby shower and birth gifts in Morocco.

## Language
Primary language: French. Arabic support planned.
